headline: Mosaic Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.22 Per Share
summary: TAMPA, FL / ACCESS Newswire / March 5, 2026 / The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS) announced today that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.22 per share on the Company's common stock. The dividend will be paid on June 2, 2026, to stockholders ...

headline: Mosaic (MOS) Downgraded by Barclays as Geopolitical Tensions Raise Cost Risks
summary: The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS) is included among the 14 Best Dividend Stocks to Invest in Under $50. On March 3, Barclays downgraded The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS) to Equal Weight from Overweight. It kept its price target unchanged at $31. The firm said the recent U.S. and Israel strikes on Iran could lead to higher ammonia […]
